# IronCoffee Solutions

> IronCoffee Solutions is the portfolio and services site of Joshua Kac, a self-taught full-stack developer with 15+ years of experience, founder of IronCoffee LLC, and CEO/Founder of Project Yoked LLC. IronCoffee builds custom websites, mobile apps, backend systems, and AWS cloud infrastructure end-to-end.

## About
- [About Joshua Kac](https://solutions.ironcoffee.com/about): Background, skills, experience.
- [Services](https://solutions.ironcoffee.com/services): Web development, mobile app development (iOS/Android), backend/API (FastAPI, Node.js), AWS cloud, consulting.
- [Contact](https://solutions.ironcoffee.com/contact): Joshua@ironcoffee.com.

## Portfolio Projects
- [Project Yoked](https://solutions.ironcoffee.com/portfolio/project-yoked): AI-powered fitness social platform (React Native, Swift, FastAPI, AWS, PostgreSQL).
- [Beyond25](https://solutions.ironcoffee.com/portfolio/beyond25): iOS wellness/community application.
- [EagleChair](https://solutions.ironcoffee.com/portfolio/eaglechair): Commercial furniture e-commerce platform.
- [Expo Media Engine](https://solutions.ironcoffee.com/portfolio/expo-media-engine): Open-source React Native Expo video composition module.
- [YokedCache](https://solutions.ironcoffee.com/portfolio/yokedcache): Python caching library (PyPI).
- [EncodeForge](https://solutions.ironcoffee.com/portfolio/encodeforge): Encoding toolkit.
- [Financial Project](https://solutions.ironcoffee.com/portfolio/financial-project): Custom financial management web application.
- [RLR Project](https://solutions.ironcoffee.com/portfolio/rlr-project): Web application development project.
- [Game Dev Tycoon Mod Maker](https://solutions.ironcoffee.com/portfolio/game-dev-tycoon-mod-maker): Game modification tool.

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: React 18, TypeScript, Vite, MUI, Styled-Components, Framer Motion
- Mobile: React Native, Swift, Xcode
- Backend: FastAPI, Python, Node.js, PostgreSQL
- Cloud: AWS, Docker, CI/CD, Firebase
